positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a celestial forest scene. The main subject is a stylized, bioluminescent stag drinking from a crystal stream beneath gigantic, glowing flora. Include floating geometric shapes that resemble moons and stars, interwoven with delicate, symmetrical vines. The color palette should be deep indigo, sapphire blue, emerald green, and ethereal gold, emphasizing dramatic contrast and glowing edges. The style should be high-contrast graphic art, reminiscent of Art Nouveau meets modern mystical minimalism, suitable for screen printing on dark fabric. Composition must be perfectly centered and symmetrical, with clean, easily reproducible silhouettes. Flat vectors, line art quality, perfect symmetry, mystical forest, bioluminescence, ethereal light, forest animal, stylized stag, crystal stream, nebula background.
negative: blur, artifacts, lowres, noise, watermarks, text, logo, watermark, grainy, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy, dirty, photorealistic, deep shadows, grayscale, monochrome
